description: No-leak committee batch, validated live: 4 orders each carry a Groth16 encryption-validity proof (side in {0,1}, amount in range, commitment-bound EC-ElGamal ciphertext), a trustless aggregator homomorphically sums the ciphertexts, a 2-of-3 committee threshold-decrypts ONLY the net, and the market moves only under a t-of-n committee authorization in a single multi-signed Soroban transaction. No single party (aggregator included) ever sees an individual order.

flow.1_offchain_pipeline: services/committee/pipeline.mjs: 4 orders proven (snarkjs groth16, circuits/encrypt.circom), all proofs verified, homomorphic sum, committee threshold-decrypt -> net (30, 20)

negative_test: duplicate signer / below-threshold quorum rejected in simulation with Error(Contract, #5) Unauthorized
notes: Committee auth entries signed with @stellar/stellar-sdk authorizeEntry (services/committee/submit-multisig.mjs); funder authorized as tx source. Trust model: t-of-n committee for privacy of individuals; chain enforces quorum + LMSR pricing. Unaudited research prototype, testnet only.
